articles.title: US embassy issues security alert amid arsons against UK Jewish sites
articles.source_summary: The Jerusalem Post is an English-language newspaper based in Israel, covering national and international news, politics, diplomacy, economy, and culture. It serves both domestic and global audiences, particularly readers interested in Middle Eastern affairs and Israeli policy. The publication operates as a commercial media outlet owned by The Jerusalem Post Group. Founded in 1932 as The Palestine Post, it was renamed after the establishment of Israel in 1948. The newspaper has developed into a prominent international source of news and analysis, offering print and digital content on a wide range of topics.

articles.title: Trump Holds Press Conference After Shooting Disrupts White House Correspondents' Dinner

articles.source_summary: Tempo is an Indonesian news magazine and digital media platform that provides coverage of national and international current affairs. It reports on politics, business, society, and culture, serving readers across Indonesia and beyond. The publication is known for investigative journalism, feature reporting, and opinion pieces, contributing to public discourse on governance and social issues. Tempo operates as a privately owned media organization and is considered part of Indonesia’s mainstream press. Founded in 1971, it has experienced periods of censorship and reform, particularly during Indonesia’s political transitions. Over time, it has expanded its digital presence through its online platform, offering multimedia content and continuous updates. Its platform reflects its role in delivering in-depth journalism and analysis within Indonesia’s media landscape.

articles.title: How OTSI assesses application for trade sanctions licences
articles.source_summary: The Department for Business and Trade is a government department of the United Kingdom responsible for economic growth, trade policy, and business development. It provides guidance, support, and regulatory oversight related to domestic and international trade, investment, and industry. The department covers topics such as export promotion, trade agreements, business regulation, and economic strategy, serving businesses, investors, and policymakers. It operates under the UK government as part of the executive branch and works with domestic and international partners. Its website offers policy documents, statistics, guidance, and official announcements. The department was established in 2023 through the merger of the Department for International Trade and parts of the Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy, reflecting a reorganization of government functions. It continues to play a central role in shaping the UK’s economic and trade policies while supporting business activity and investment.

articles.source_summary: ARY News is a Pakistani television news channel and digital platform providing coverage of national and international news, politics, business, and current affairs. It serves a broad Urdu-speaking audience and is considered a mainstream media outlet in Pakistan. The channel operates as part of the ARY Digital Network, a private media group. Launched in 2004, ARY News has developed into a widely viewed broadcaster, offering live news coverage, talk shows, and digital content focused on political and social developments.

articles.source_summary: The Daily Caller is a U.S.-based digital news and opinion platform providing coverage of politics, public policy, and current affairs. It publishes articles, commentary, and multimedia content targeting a national audience interested in political developments. The outlet is privately owned and is generally described as a conservative publication within the American media landscape. Founded in 2010 by journalist Tucker Carlson and Neil Patel, it has developed a significant online presence. Its content includes news reporting, opinion pieces, and investigative articles, contributing to political discourse in the United States.

articles.title: Unmanned cargo spacecraft takes off for International Space Station
articles.summary:
The unmanned Progress 95 took off on board a Soyuz rocket from the Baikonur Cosmodrome. The Roscosmos spacecraft carries food, fuel, and supplies for the crew on board the International Space Station. It will take the spacecraft about two day to reach the space station.

articles.title: ¿Tragedia en Teotihuacán se pudo evitar? Escuelas son clave para prevenir estos casos, según experta
articles.summary: Tras el ataque ocurrido en Teotihuacán, especialistas han comenzado a analizar el perfil psicológico de Julio César Jasso Ramírez, identificado con una conducta tipo copycat, es decir, la tendencia a imitar actos violentos ocurridos en otros contextos. De acuerdo con autoridades y expertos, el agresor no actuó de forma impulsiva, sino influenciado por referencias externas, simbologías y narrativas violentas que replicó como parte de su ataque. Este patrón ha encendido alertas sobre cómo la...

articles.source_summary: Al-Khaleej Today is a digital news aggregator that compiles and publishes news stories from various sources, focusing on developments in the Middle East and beyond. Its coverage includes politics, economy, technology, and general interest topics, often presenting summaries of news from other outlets. The platform operates online and emphasizes rapid content updates and accessibility. While it provides a broad range of topics, its content is largely derived from external sources rather than original reporting. Al-Khaleej Today serves readers seeking quick overviews of current events, particularly in the Gulf region. Its role is primarily informational, contributing to the wider ecosystem of digital aggregation platforms that distribute news content across different audiences.

articles.title: Day Care di Yogya Digerebek,Diduga Aniaya-Terlantarkan Anak
articles.summary:
Day care di Umbulharjo, Yogyakarta, digerebek polisi usai laporan karyawan yang mundur karena melihat dugaan perlakuan tidak manusiawi terhadap anak.

Polisi menyebut anak-anak diduga mengalami penelantaran dan penganiayaan, meski detailnya masih didalami.

Sejumlah orang tua juga melapor, dengan salah satu mengaku anaknya sempat diikat, dibedong, dan ditidurkan tanpa bantal.

📸: Dok. Istimewa, Polresta Yogyakarta.

Baca selengkapnya dengan klik link di bio. Cari tahu berita update lainnya...

South Africa’s Chief Rabbi says Pope Leo ‘has blood on his hands’
articles.summary:
Speaking at an event organised by the South Africa Zionist Foundation (SAZF), Warren Goldstein, Chief Rabbi of South Africa, attacked Pope Leo XIV, saying that “he has blood on his hands” because of the Pope’s criticism of the US-Israeli war on Iran and Lebanon.

Goldstein accused the Pope of not respecting the “noble and brave soldiers of the State of Israel” and claimed he failed to distinguish between “good and evil”.

This attack follows similar criticisms levelled by Goldstein against Pope...

articles.title: ¿QUÉ ES EL "EFECTO COLUMBINE"? | Tirad0r en Teotihuacán replicó una masacr3 que sucedió en EU
articles.summary:
Cuando la tragedia y la violencia se convierten en guion

La violencia a veces deja de ser un evento aislado para volverse un guion. El reciente ataque en #Teotihuacán este 20 de abril es un ejemplo del "efecto Columbine". El agresor no solo planeó el acto, sino que se mimetizó con el personaje, hallándose incluso fotos suyas editadas con los perpetradores originales.

Desde la cultura pop hasta actos simbólicos, parece que la violencia se consume y se repite.

Christian Arrieta nos...
